meta.title: XPOTrans | Global Logistics
meta.description: Premium international logistics operator. Express delivery, customs support and global transportation routes.
meta.ogDescription: Premium international logistics operator. Express delivery, customs support and global transportation routes.

hero.introShort: A premium full-cycle operator. We keep supply chains running for world-class leaders.
hero.introLong: A premium full-cycle operator. We keep supply chains running for industry leaders, connecting continents with clockwork precision.

cards.title: AIR FREIGHT
cards.desktopDesc: Express global delivery with priority cargo handling.

cards.title: RAIL TRANSPORT
cards.mobileDesc: Reliable shipments across the CIS and Europe
cards.desktopDesc: Cost-efficient transcontinental solutions along Eurasian corridors.

cards.title: SEA FREIGHT
cards.desktopDesc: Direct contracts with leading lines (FCL/LCL) across all ocean routes.

cards.title: LESS THAN CONTAINER LOAD (LCL)
cards.desktopDesc: Cost optimization for smaller consignments with a regular departure schedule.

cards.title: OVERSIZED CARGO
cards.desktopDesc: Project logistics for industrial giants with increased complexity.

geography.title: Global Presence
geography.description: We push the boundaries by opening direct transcontinental corridors to North America (USA, Canada) and across Eurasia.

steps.title: Inquiry and calculation
steps.text: Submit a request and our specialists will prepare a detailed commercial offer with cost and timing calculations within 2 hours.

steps.title: Transport selection
steps.text: We choose the optimal transport mode and route, taking into account your cargo specifics and safety requirements.

steps.title: Door-to-door delivery
steps.text: We handle cargo pickup, customs clearance and delivery to the final destination with full support.

about.description: We are experts in complex international logistics. We remove barriers for your business.

features.title: Reliability
features.desc: We guarantee execution in any conditions.

features.title: Individual Approach
features.desc: We tailor processes to your specific requirements.

contact.formSubtitle: Get a detailed offer and transport cost estimate within 2 hours.
contact.successMessage: Our specialist will contact you within 2 hours.
contact.disclaimer: By clicking the button, you agree to the privacy policy

validation.name: Enter your first and last name
validation.phonePrefix: Enter the number with country code, e.g. +998...
validation.serverError: An error occurred, please try again later

map.title: Shipping Geography
map.description: We deliver to more than 60 countries around the globe. We use road, air, rail and multimodal solutions. We provide precise logistics, optimal routes and control at every stage of transport.

chat.defaultMessage: Hello! I am your international transport assistant. How can I help?
